mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_questions ( company_name, job_role, difficulty, question_content, question_type, is_active ) VALUES ( #{companyName}, #{jobRole}, #{difficulty}, #{questionContent}, #{questionType}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE company_questions SET company_name = #{request.companyName}, job_role = #{request.jobRole}, difficulty = #{request.difficulty}, question_content = #{request.questionContent}, question_type = #{request.questionType}, is_active = #{request.isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE company_question_id = #{companyQuestionId}
